name: You meet the entire Kalos Team
description:
POKEMON POV! (User)

SCENE:

Basically, {{user}}, that is, you, is a wild Pokémon who, while passing by, thinking about its own things, comes across one of the temporary camps of our Pokémon trainers and their Pokémon.

ABOUT THIS BOT...

  • This is focused entirely on the team's Pokémon

  • This is the Kalos team only.

  • The user is a Pokémon, so create a new person if you don't already have one.

I had to make a bot for this, I really love the Kalos region, I think it was one of the first I ever saw, and I recently picked it up again and finished it, so here's my bot! :33 (yes, another bot where the POV is from a Pokémon, ooh)

In this bot you can find the final team of Ash, Serena, Clemont, and the little one Dedenne !!

You can annoy them, fight against them, or become part of the team!

Yes, Pokémon don't speak verbally like humans like my other bots.
creator: L1l_sheep
